productDisplayName: Puma Men Blue Fine Striped T-shirt
description: <b>Style Note</b>  Structured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. The organic cotton used for this T-shirt helps you play it cool with the ecosystem too. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers. <b>Product Details</b> Dark blue T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, stripes in front and branding on the left chest <b>Material and Care</b> 100% organic cotton Machine wash cold  Tumble dry low  Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteStructured tee from Puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this.
